description: A request to add objects to a set

from.description: Name of the set from which records are to be added to this one

cond.description: An SQL-like WHERE condition specifying the selection of records to be added

filter.description: The name of a filter to be applied to selection of records to be added

tag.description: A comma-separated list of the names of tags, specifying that only those selected records with any of the tags will be added

omitTag.description: A comma-separated list of the names of tags, specifying that only those selected records without any of the tags will be be added

limit.description: A maximum number of objects that will be added to the set
